value.found_quote: Claude Code can connect to hundreds of external tools and data sources through the [Model Context Protocol (MCP)](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/introduction), an open source standard for AI-tool integrations. MCP servers give Claude Code access to your tools, databases, and APIs.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Claude Code connecting to external tools and data sources via the open-source MCP standard. It documents support for both locally-run stdio servers (Option 3: "Stdio servers run as local processes on your machine") and remote/hosted servers (Option 1 HTTP, Option 2 SSE, Option 4 WebSocket). This fully substantiates the claim, and the page presents it as a currently available, documented feature.
